spec.expr: avg(1 - rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", mode="idle"}[1m])) by (job, instance)

label_replace(
  node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"},
  "instance", "$1", "instance", "^[^:]+:[^:]+:[^:]+:(.+)"
)

label_replace(
  node_memory_SwapFree_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"},
  "instance", "$1", "instance", "^[^:]+:[^:]+:[^:]+:(.+)"
)

(1 - (node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} 
    / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}))
node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}

(1 - (node_memory_SwapFree_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} 
    / node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}))

label_replace(
  label_join(
    label_replace(
      node_filesystem_size_bytes{
        job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance",
        fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|fuse.lxcfs",
        mountpoint!~"/run.*|/boot.*|/etc/pve|/usr.*|/oem",
        device!~"tmpfs|lxcfs"
      },
      "instance", "$1", "instance", "^[^:]+:[^:]+:[^:]+:(.+)"
    ),
    "instancemountpoint",    # target label to store combined value
    ":",           # separator between labels
    "instance", "mountpoint"
  ),
  "instancemountpoint",      # target label for final regex
  "$1",            # keep only the part before the colon
  "instance",      # source label
  "([^:]+):.*"     # regex: capture everything before colon
)

      and on(instance, device) node_network_up{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", device!~"cali.*|cilium.*|lxc.*|fw.*|lo"} > 0,
    "instance", "$1", "instance", "^[^:]+:[^:]+:[^:]+:(.+)"

    "instance", "$1", "instance", "^[^:]+:[^:]+:[^:]+:(.+)"
